response.justification: Bogdan brings highly relevant Staff-level experience from top-tier companies with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and high-throughput distributed systems. While he lacks the required Python expertise, his polyglot background, proven technical leadership, and hands-on work with agentic workflows make him a very strong candidate for this AI-native environment.
strengths: Direct, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Stripe.
Proven expertise in high-throughput architectures, having built microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated Staff-level ownership and technical strategy experience across top-tier companies and startups.
concerns: Lacks the 'must-have' strong Python expertise, with a background focused more on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang.
Does not explicitly mention experience with out-of-hours on-call rotations or direct incident response.
Confusing work history entries (e.g., listing 'Founder, Datadog' for a Geo-Data platform) that will require clarification.
